text:
Your limit at 0.42 on Knicks ML didn't fill even though the market moved through that price — that's worth investigating directly.

On a peer-to-peer exchange, your order fills when another user's bet matches yours at that price or better. If the line moved through 0.42 but you didn't get matched, it could be a few things: the volume at that price, how orders are sequenced, or a technical issue. I can't say which without looking at the specific order.

Share your order ID and I'll have our ops team pull the details and tell you what happened.

Novig Support
